Package org.rodinp.core.indexer

Interface IIndexingBridge

All Known Implementing Classes:
BridgeStub, CancelBridgeStub, IndexingBridge
public interface IIndexingBridge
Common protocol for reporting the result of indexing a Rodin file.

When a file is indexed, an instance of this interface is passed to the indexer which gets its inputs and reports its results through its methods.

Two methods allow the indexer to query its inputs:

  • getRootToIndex returns the root element of the file which is currently indexed.
  • getImports returns the declarations exported by the files on which the current file depends.

Three methods allow the indexer to report its results:

  • declare reports a new declaration in the current file.
  • addOccurrence reports an occurrence in the current file.
  • export indicates that a declaration is to be exported to files that depend on the current file.

Please note that, when indexing completes, declarations that have no associated occurrence are simply ignored (i.e., not stored in the index).

Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • IIndexer

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addOccurrence(IDeclaration declaration, IOccurrenceKind kind, IInternalLocation location)
    Adds an occurrence of the given declaration with the given kind, and at the given location.
    IDeclaration
    declare(IInternalElement element, String name)
    Declares the given element with the given name.
    void
    export(IDeclaration declaration)
    Exports the given element, making it visible to dependent files.
    IDeclaration[]
    getDeclarations()
    Returns declarations that have been recorded so far.
    IDeclaration[]
    getImports()
    Returns the declarations visible from files on which the current file depends.
    IInternalElement
    getRootToIndex()
    Returns the root element of the file which is to be indexed.
    boolean
    isCancelled()
    Tells whether this task has been cancelled.

  • Method Details

    • getRootToIndex

      IInternalElement getRootToIndex()
      Returns the root element of the file which is to be indexed.
      Returns:
      the root element of the file to index

    • getDeclarations

      IDeclaration[] getDeclarations()
      Returns declarations that have been recorded so far. This method is particularly intended to be used by indexers that are called in sequence, so that they can get declarations from indexers run previously on the same file.
      Returns:
      all declarations recorded so far

    • getImports

      IDeclaration[] getImports()
      Returns the declarations visible from files on which the current file depends. The declarations returned are all those that were exported by the last indexing of every file on which the current file depends.

      The returned declarations can subsequently be exported (so they come visible to dependent files) and the indexer can report occurrences for them.

      Returns:
      the imported declarations

    • declare

      IDeclaration declare(IInternalElement element, String name)
      Declares the given element with the given name. The name represents the user-visible name of the element, not the element name in the Rodin database. An element must not be declared more than once in an indexing run.
      Parameters:
      element - the element to declare, must belong to the current file
      name - the user-visible name of the element
      Returns:
      the declaration created for this element
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given element is not a descendant of the root being indexed or has already been declared

    • addOccurrence

      void addOccurrence(IDeclaration declaration, IOccurrenceKind kind, IInternalLocation location)
      Adds an occurrence of the given declaration with the given kind, and at the given location.

      The location must point to an element inside the file being indexed.

      The given declaration must be either local to the file or imported. The latter case is equivalent to saying that the declaration must be contained in the ones returned by getImports().

      Parameters:
      declaration - the declaration of the occurrence
      kind - the kind of the occurrence
      location - the location of the occurrence
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the location is not valid or if the declaration is neither local, nor imported

    • export

      void export(IDeclaration declaration)
      Exports the given element, making it visible to dependent files.
      Parameters:
      declaration - the declaration of the element to export, must be declared in the current file or imported
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given declaration is neither local nor imported

    • isCancelled

      boolean isCancelled()
      Tells whether this task has been cancelled.

      This method should be regularly called by indexers to stop as soon as possible when cancel is requested.

      Returns:
      true iff this task has been cancelled
